nasb.text: He defeated the Philistines as far as Gaza and its territory, from watchtower to fortified city.

esv.text: He struck down the Philistines as far as Gaza and its territory, from watchtower to fortified city.

cnv.text: 他攻擊非利士人，直到迦薩和它的四境，從哨站以至設防城。

ccb.text: 他击败非利士人，从他们的瞭望塔和坚城，一直打到迦萨及其四境。
